isDiscountPatterns: Hab: DiscountSurchargeCode constants mapped via TryConvertToFrameworkHabDiscount
Auto: AutoDisSurCode constants mapped via TryConvertToFrameworkAutoDiscount
Falls back to generic v043/V127 base patterns for unmatched codes
isSurchargePatterns: Hab: HDHHP (primary heat), HDHHB/HDHHW (auxiliary heat), HFAM (multi-family), HSRLF (mortgage), HDHF1/HDHF2/HDHP1/HDHP2 (heat adjustment), HDHAL/HSEQS/HSEQY/NSF/HSNPY (misc), HDRLG (mobile age)

habCoverage.description: Legal Loss Assessment Condo Corp Deductible

scheduledProperty.description: Electric Wheelchair All Risk RSA ON
Electric Wheelchair Named Perils RSA ON

orphanCodes: ZHPAC (PetInsuranceAccidental - declared but not seen in converter logic)
ZHVAP (VancityPureHome - declared but not seen in converter logic)
ZHMEC (MechanicsTools - declared but not seen in converter logic)
notes: RSA exists only in V128 - single version carrier
Inherits from V127/V128 Generic and falls back to v043 Generic base
Three sub-brands share this codebase: RSA (product code RSA/PER/PPL), CNS (product code CPH), and Western Assurance (product code WAH)
CompanyConstants.vb: 763 lines, ~220 constants across 24 nested classes
CoverageCodeConverter.vb: 583 lines with both directions (FrameworkToCsio and CsioToFramework)
RiskConverter.vb: 404 lines with comprehensive scheduled property mapping
Province-specific logic present for Building Bylaws (ON/BC), Golf Equipment (AB/MB/SK/NS/NB/PE -> Sports Equipment)
Short Term Rental has complex policy-type-dependent routing (Home/Condo/Seasonal/MobileHome each produce different codes)
